svg.title: SVG Image created as esp32-led-controller-v6.svg date 2026-05-20T21:56:32

g.style: fill:#000000; fill-opacity:1.0000;stroke:#000000; stroke-opacity:1.0000; stroke-linecap:round; stroke-linejoin:round;

g.text: Title: ESP32 LED Controller v6 — KiCad Bench Schematic

g.desc: Title: ESP32 LED Controller v6 — KiCad Bench Schematic

g.text: ESP32 USB-powered only; common GND; AHCT125 DIP-14 top-view shown for bench wiring

g.desc: ESP32 USB-powered only; common GND; AHCT125 DIP-14 top-view shown for bench wiring

g.text: U1 unused channels: /OE3 pin10 and /OE4 pin13 → +5V_LOGIC; 3A pin9 and 4A pin12 → GND; 3Y pin8 and 4Y pin11 NC.

g.desc: U1 unused channels: /OE3 pin10 and /OE4 pin13 → +5V_LOGIC; 3A pin9 and 4A pin12 → GND; 3Y pin8 and 4Y pin11 NC.

g.text: D1 current note: 1N5822 is not a free pass for multi-amp LED current. For full-current install, replace with rated protection or bypass if polarity is controlled.

g.desc: D1 current note: 1N5822 is not a free pass for multi-amp LED current. For full-current install, replace with rated protection or bypass if polarity is controlled.

g.text: Bench checks before power: +12V_PROTECTED ↔ +5V_LOGIC = open/megaohms; all GND points ≈0Ω; U1 pin14 gets +5V only from ESP32 USB/VIN; never backfeed ESP32 VIN from 12 V supply.

g.desc: Bench checks before power: +12V_PROTECTED ↔ +5V_LOGIC = open/megaohms; all GND points ≈0Ω; U1 pin14 gets +5V only from ESP32 USB/VIN; never backfeed ESP32 VIN from 12 V supply.

g.text: Rails: +12V_PROTECTED powers LED V+ only. +5V_LOGIC is USB-derived from ESP32 VIN/5V only. Grounds are common.

g.desc: Rails: +12V_PROTECTED powers LED V+ only. +5V_LOGIC is USB-derived from ESP32 VIN/5V only. Grounds are common.

g.text: ESP32 LED Controller v6 — KiCad bench schematic
